CustomField.description: Used by NPPatch to calculate the Task due date. For top-level tasks, days are counted from the Engagement Plan creation date. For dependent tasks, days are counted from the parent Task's due date. Weekend skipping applies if configured on the template.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many days after the plan start (or parent task due date, for dependent tasks) this Task should be due.
CustomField.label: Days After
